title: Eva 30 303 and 333
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 16, 2011 2:45 pm We all know there was 1.0, 1.01, and 1.11.. And 2.0, etc etc (I'm not quite sure on what differences there are, other than slight changes in the audio, from what I've heard). I assume there will be a 3.33, the final verison, correct? How long does it take for Gainax (or whoever is making the rebuild) take to make the three movies, even though there are only slight differences? Will 3.xx come out in theaters in America, or just on DVD? How long does dubbing take? A few months? Sorry to ask so many questions, I needed to clear this up. Please do not tell me to search other threads, or link me anywhere.

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Oct 16, 2011 3:14 pm Kye7 wrote: We all know there was 1.0, 1.01, and 1.11.. And 2.0, etc etc (I'm not quite sure on what differences there are, other than slight changes in the audio, from what I've heard). I assume there will be a 3.33, the final verison, correct? How long does it take for Gainax (or whoever is making the rebuild) take to make the three movies, even though there are only slight differences? Will 3.xx come out in theaters in America, or just on DVD? How long does dubbing take? A few months? Sorry to ask so many questions, I needed to clear this up. Please do not tell me to search other threads, or link me anywhere.

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 16, 2011 3:34 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: differences and comparison here [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evangelion_2.0_vs._Evangelion_2.22[/url]. studio khara is in charge, it's an animation studio anno started. it will probably only have some select screenings like with 2.0. 3.33 or Q when it comes out will be the updated version on blu- ray and DVD, they will not get 3.0 or 3.03. the dubbing depends on the date they acquire the property.

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Oct 16, 2011 4:13 pm Kye7 wrote: I do hope it's not too long...

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 16, 2011 4:15 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: I don't want to burst your bubble, but about the wait....

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Oct 16, 2011 5:09 pm just scroll down all the way on that page it's tells you exactly what changes were made. They acquire the rights within months of the Japanese release of 3.33. also, yes 3.33 or Q will be the final version, with all the extra content . well until khara want's to make more money. funimation always releases big titles on blu-ray .

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 16, 2011 5:40 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: just scroll down all the way on that page it's tells you exactly what changes were made. They acquire the rights within months of the Japanese release of 3.33. also, yes 3.33 or Q will be the final version, with all the extra content . well until khara want's to make more money. funimation always releases big titles on blu-ray .

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Oct 16, 2011 5:53 pm Kye7 wrote: Awesome, I'm going to buy Platinum (is that the best version? What about that holiday version?) around Christmas. Even though I've already seen 1.11 and 2.22, through ways I can't say, I'll be SURE to buy the tetralogy when all the final edited versions come out. How does FUNimation get rights to all of these big anime hits?

[]: Re: Eva 3.0, 3.03, and 3.33             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 16, 2011 6:01 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: great hope you get the rebuild soon, you can start now the blu rays of 1.11 and 2.22 are cheap on amazon. Yes both platinum or the holiday version are fine. as to your question about the anime industry I'm not the one to ask .

[]: well             Quote Post by OmegaEW » Thu Oct 20, 2011 7:58 pm in other site i found the evangelion 3.33 will come october of 2012 but i dunno if its true.

[]: Re: well             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 20, 2011 10:03 pm OmegaEW wrote: in other site i found the evangelion 3.33 will come october of 2012 but i dunno if its true.
